name: Sky Acquisition Group
business: Sky Acquisition Group is a blank check company incorporated on November 26, 2025 as a Cayman Islands exempted company formed for the purpose of effecting a merger, amalgamation, share exchange, asset acquisition, share purchase, reorganization or similar business combination with one or more businesses. We intend to focus on identifying and acquiring one or more AI-native or AI-transformed technology companies that we believe are positioned to become leaders in the rapidly expanding market for agentic AI, autonomous systems, data-driven platforms, and next-generation digital infrastructure.

We believe we are in the early stages of a long-term adoption curve in which AI-native companies will displace legacy software and hardware incumbents across multiple verticals, including: Enterprise Software as a Service (SaaS) and workflow automation IT operations, security, and cloud infrastructure Healthcare diagnostics and clinical operations Financial services and large-scale transactional systems Industrial automation, robotics, and supply-chain optimization Transportation, mobility, and smart infrastructure Media, entertainment, and real-time immersive platforms Energy management and sustainability technologies.

tamClaims.claim: Industry analysts estimate that the markets most directly impacted by applied AI including enterprise automation, vertical AI applications, AI-enabled cloud infrastructure, autonomous systems, predictive analytics, spatial intelligence, and next-generation software represent an opportunity exceeding $1 trillion today, expanding to approximately $3 4 trillion globally by 2030.
tamClaims.sentence: Industry analysts estimate that the markets most directly impacted by applied AI including enterprise automation, vertical AI applications, AI-enabled cloud infrastructure, autonomous systems, predictive analytics, spatial intelligence, and next-generation software represent an opportunity exceeding $1 trillion today, expanding to approximately $3 4 trillion globally by 2030.

tamClaims.claim: Analyst forecasts project enterprise AI spending to grow at a compounded annual growth rate exceeding 30% over the next decade.
tamClaims.sentence: Analyst forecasts project enterprise AI spending to grow at a compounded annual growth rate exceeding 30% over the next decade.
